demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse, who is present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My joints are completely locked, I feel feverish and exhausted, and the pain is driving me to tears. My hands and feet are so bad I can't stand or walk on my own.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has got dramatically worse over the last day and I can't get out of bed or walk safely, and normal appointments aren't open yet.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on and got much worse over about 24 hours, a few days after a mild cold/viral bug
symptom_narrative.duration: about a day of severe symptoms on top of a longer grumbling problem
symptom_narrative.character: stiffness and swelling in lots of small joints; my hands and knuckles and the balls of my feet are swollen and sore
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has been, pain that makes me cry; my feet feel like I'm walking on broken glass
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both hands (knuckles and finger joints), both wrists, and the balls of both feet - it's on both sides pretty evenly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst in the morning; the stiffness lasts more than three hours before it eases at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; the paracetamol I took did not help
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to move, stand or walk, and first thing in the morning
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling hot and feverish, and completely wiped out and exhausted
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I was diagnosed with rheumatoid arthritis not long ago and take a tablet for it, but it has never flared up this badly before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed and need my spouse to help me with everything - moving, getting up, going to the toilet

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: rheumatoid arthritis, diagnosed fairly recently, told it was the 'seropositive' type

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol I bought over the counter, taken today

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a spouse who is very worried and is doing all the lifting and helping; high risk of falling because of the foot pain and stiffness

objective_data_offered.value: both hands look swollen and puffy across the knuckles and finger joints
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen on video by the clinician end; not a hands-on examination

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says both hands and both feet are swollen on both sides and she cannot bear weight or walk unaided
feels hot and feverish, but we have not measured a temperature with a thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective feverishness only; no measured temperature available
